name: Rogelio Dimakiling Jr.
intro: Computer Engineer and former public school teacher who spent 4 years building automation systems that eliminated 100% of manual reporting across an entire school. Now transitioning into AI/LLM Engineering — building production-ready systems with Python, FastAPI, and modern AI tooling.
